zh.lifeSummary: 當Hildegarde de Penthièvre於大約1060年出生在法國時，她的父親Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne62歲，母親Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille34歲。她於1079年與Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle在法國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hildegarde de Penthièvre于大约1060年出生在法国时，她的父亲Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne62岁，母亲Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille34岁。她于1079年与Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle在法国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hildegarde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an old Germanic female personal name composed of hild ‘battle’ + gard ‘enclosure’. It was borne by the second wife of Charlemagne and by the mystical writer Hildegard of Bingen ( 1098–1179 ), in whose music and writings there has been great interest in recent decades.

en.lifeSummary: When Hildegarde de Penthièvre was born about 1060, in France, her father, Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne, was 62 and her mother, Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille, was 34. She married Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle in 1079, in France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hildegarde de Penthièvre est née environ 1060, à France, son père, Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne, avait 62 ans et sa mère, Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle en 1079, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hildegarde de Penthièvre um 1060 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne 62 und ihre Mutter Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille 34. Sie hat 1079 in Frankreich Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hildegarde de Penthièvre è nata il circa 1060 nel Francia, sua padre, Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne, aveva 62 anni e sua madre, Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle nel 1079, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Easby, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアエアスビー
ja.lifeSummary: Hildegarde de Penthièvreが約1060年にフランスで生まれた時，父Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagneは62歳，母Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouailleは34歳であった。1079年にフランスでEnisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Hildegarde de Penthièvre(이)가 대략 1060년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne(은)는 62세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1079년 프랑스에서 Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hildegarde de Penthièvre nasceu aproximadamente 1060, em França, seu pai, Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne, tinha 62 anos e sua mãe, Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle em 1079, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hildegarde de Penthièvre родилась около 1060 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne было 62 года, а матери, которую звали Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle в 1079 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hildegarde de Penthièvre nació aproximadamente 1060, en Francia, su papá, Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne, tenía 62 años y su mamá, Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle en 1079, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas.
